zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD报9.1474，24小时涨幅仅0.15%，价格运行于9.1368至9.1616窄幅区间内，显示市场观望情绪较浓。整体来看，币价仍处于短线整理阶段，反弹力度有限，趋势结构偏弱，暂未形成明确上升信号。

从技术指标观察，20日简单移动平均线位于9.2663附近，现价明显低于均线，说明中期趋势仍受压制。MACD值为-0.0457，处于零轴下方，反映空头动能尚未完全消退。由于RSI数据缺失，短期超买超卖状态暂难确认。

关键支撑区域可关注9.1368一线，该位置为日内低点附近，若失守可能进一步测试9.10整数关口。上方首个阻力位位于9.16附近，更强阻力则在20日均线9.27区域，只有有效突破后才有望改善技术形态。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，等待价格放量突破9.16或跌破9.13后再顺势跟进。激进交易者可依托支撑位进行轻仓试多，但需严格设置止损。中线投资者则建议关注能否重新站稳20日均线，以确认趋势反转信号。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading near 9.15, remaining under mild bearish pressure as price action stays below the 20-day simple moving average at 9.27. This positioning suggests momentum has yet to shift decisively in favor of buyers, with the short-term trend still tilted lower despite the modest 24-hour gain. The narrow intraday range between 9.14 and 9.16 also points to limited conviction, indicating the market is consolidating rather than initiating a strong directional move.

Momentum indicators offer a cautious picture. While the RSI(14) is unavailable, the negative MACD reading at -0.0457 implies bearish momentum remains present beneath the surface. Without a signal line, crossover confirmation is absent, but the negative MACD value alone suggests sellers retain a slight advantage. At the same time, the relatively stable daily change of 0.15% indicates bearish pressure is not accelerating, leaving room for stabilization if buying interest increases.

Key technical levels are becoming increasingly important at current prices. Immediate support appears near the recent low around 9.14, with a break below this zone potentially exposing further downside toward psychologically important levels near 9.00. On the upside, resistance is developing around the SMA(20) near 9.27, followed by a stronger barrier near 9.40 if momentum improves. A decisive move above moving-average resistance would strengthen the case for short-term recovery.

For traders, patience may be preferable until clearer confirmation emerges. Conservative participants could wait for a sustained move above 9.27 before considering bullish exposure, as reclaiming the moving average may signal improving sentiment. More aggressive traders might monitor rebounds near support for short-term opportunities but should apply disciplined stop-loss levels below 9.14, given the ongoing softness in momentum indicators and limited upside confirmation.
